steps.title: Provide a nickname
steps.content: The student wants an example of a dinosaur fossil specimen's nickname. The notes identify one specimen by nickname, location, and genus: Pops, a Triceratops specimen at the Denver Museum of Nature and Science.

steps.title: Name the example directly
steps.content: A says a nicknamed specimen exists but never gives the nickname. B gives the genus, age, and museum but omits the nickname. C is only a general statement about nicknames. The sentence must name Pops as the example. The answer is D.
